name: Button

interaction_states.hover: Decrease lightness by 5-10% or apply subtle drop shadow.
interaction_states.active: Scale down to 0.98 or remove drop shadow (simulate press).
interaction_states.focus: Apply 2px offset focus ring matching brand primary color.

accessibility_rules: Minimum contrast ratio 4.5:1 for text against button background.
Touch target minimum 44x44pt on mobile.
Must use semantic <button> or role='button' with proper aria-label if icon-only.

styling_guidelines.padding: px-4 py-2 for base, px-6 py-3 for lg.

name: Card

interaction_states.default: Base surface color (e.g., bg-white or bg-slate-900).
interaction_states.hover: If interactive, elevate shadow (e.g., shadow-md to shadow-xl) and apply subtle transform -translate-y-1.
interaction_states.focus: Focus ring if the entire card is a link.

accessibility_rules: If interactive, avoid nested interactive elements (buttons inside a linked card) unless handled carefully with z-index and event propagation.
Ensure logical reading order (DOM order matches visual order).

styling_guidelines.padding: p-4 or p-6 consistent across breakpoints.
styling_guidelines.border_radius: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Image inside must have matching border-radius minus padding.

name: Dialog / Modal

interaction_states.enter: Animate in (fade overlay, slide up + fade panel).

accessibility_rules: Focus must be trapped inside the modal while open.
Initial focus should be on the first interactive element or the modal itself.
Must be dismissible via ESC key and clicking the overlay.
Use role='dialog' and aria-modal='true'.

styling_guidelines.panel: Max width defined (max-w-md, max-w-lg), centered in viewport.
styling_guidelines.z_index: Ensure it sits above all other elements (z-50).

name: Input Field

interaction_states.default: Border subtle, background surface or transparent.
interaction_states.focus: Highlight border with brand primary, apply focus ring.
interaction_states.error: Border destructive red, text red, shake animation.

accessibility_rules: Label must be explicitly tied to input via id/htmlFor.
Never use placeholder as a replacement for label.
Error messages must use aria-describedby.

styling_guidelines.height: Match button heights (e.g., h-10 for base).
styling_guidelines.spacing: Gap of 4px between label, input, and helper text.

name: Data Table

interaction_states.row_hover: bg-muted/50 to help eye tracking across wide screens.
interaction_states.sort_active: Highlight column header and show directional arrow.

accessibility_rules: Use semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>, <tr>, <th>, <td>.
Include scope='col' or scope='row' on header cells.

styling_guidelines.alignment: Numbers right-aligned, text left-aligned, status badges centered.

name: Select/Dropdown
accessibility_rules: Keyboard navigable
Screen reader supported via ARIA roles
